response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering practices and 13+ years of professional experience, they critically lack the three core mandatory requirements for this role. They have only ~6 months of documented C++ experience against the mandatory 5–10 years requirement, no Windows platform development background (their career is entirely web/backend focused), and zero capital markets or fixed income domain expertise. Retraining would be extensive and misaligned with a consulting engagement timeline.
strengths: 13+ years professional experience exceeds seniority requirements and demonstrates depth in software engineering
Strong software engineering discipline with proven TDD, CI/CD, and testing practices across multiple roles
Excellent communication and mentoring skills demonstrated through workshops, conference talks, and open-source community contributions
concerns: Only ~6 months of documented C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014–2015) versus mandatory 5–10 years requirement
No Windows platform development experience; entire career focused on web/backend (Node.js, TypeScript) and Linux systems
Zero capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain expertise; closest exposure is a brief fintech role (RIDE Capital) with no financial systems background

key_factors.factor: Capital markets or fixed income domain knowledge (mandatory)
